name: aaron-intelligence
description: Aaron's personal Claude Code enhancements — a growing bundle of hooks, skills, and commands tuned to how he works. First component: a PreToolUse guard that soft-blocks using Bash (cat/head/tail/sed -i/echo>file) as a stand-in for the Read/Edit/Write tools and tells Claude which tool to use instead.

hooks.statusMessage: Checking Bash command against file-tool guard...
